info.title: Kumbaya API
info.description: API for Kumbaya social platform for MegaETH token trading with challenges and discussions

tags.name: Content
tags.description: Public landing-page content cards (yaps, tips, shills)

tags.name: Feed
tags.description: Launchpad token feed with cursor-based pagination

tags.name: Fuel
tags.description: FuelVault credit and creator bucket token lists

tags.name: Launch
tags.description: Token launch wizard with resumable state machine

post.description: Creates a new session from Privy authentication token

get.description: Returns the current user session

post.description: Returns the wallet/account state for the given address. Looks up User by walletAddress (embedded). A wallet can be signed in but not have an embedded wallet. Used to show the right CTA (create Kumbaya wallet, link embedded wallet, or sign in).
Refreshes the JWT token. Requires a valid Privy token to verify the user is still authenticated.
Logs out the current user

get.description: Returns a one-time nonce for Sign In With Ethereum (EIP-4361)

post.description: Verifies an EIP-4361 signed message and returns a JWT session token

get.description: Check if a username is available for use

get.summary: Get user profile by wallet address
get.description: Get public profile information for a user by their wallet address

patch.description: Update current user's profile (name and image only)

post.description: Upload and process a profile image for the current user

get.description: Get current authenticated user's profile
Get aggregated stats for a user by wallet address
Get recent activity for a user (launches, yaps, fuels) for the profile signals sidebar
Get paginated comments by a user with token context
Get paginated fuel reactions given and received by a user
Get paginated swap history for a user from the indexer

delete.description: Admin-only: Delete a user's profile image
Admin-only: Delete a user's display name

patch.description: Admin-only: Edit a user's profile (name). Bypasses cooldown restrictions.
Admin-only: Set a user's disabled (banned) status.
Admin-only: Assign a badge to a user or remove their badge.

get.description: Get a single Fire token by composite ID (address-chainId), merged with off-chain metadata

post.description: Report inappropriate or scam tokens. Rate limited to prevent abuse.

get.description: Get paginated list of buyers (participants) for a fire token launch, ordered by volume or activity.
Cumulative buyer count, gap-filled across a fixed window ending at the current bucket. Pre-window buyers are folded into the first bucket so long-lived tokens still start at the right total.
Get paginated list of fuels (gift reactions) for a token, with user and comment info.
Get user's position and PnL data for a specific fire token. Returns token amounts bought/sold, cost basis, and realized PnL.

post.description: Get token thumbnail images for multiple mint addresses. Returns a map of address -> {thumbUrl}. Useful for enriching activity feeds.

delete.description: Admin-only: Soft delete token metadata and delete token image. Comments are preserved.

patch.description: Admin-only: Edit token metadata (description, category, links, etc.)

delete.description: Admin-only: Delete media from a token without deleting the token metadata

post.description: Claim an unclaimed token listing by providing metadata and a signature proving you are the on-chain creator
Upload an image for a claimed token listing

404.description: Token metadata not found - claim first

get.description: Get comments for a specific token by its mint address

post.description: Get authenticated viewer reaction and fuel state for a batch of comments.

get.description: Get a single comment by ID

403.description: Not authorized to update this comment or edit window expired

delete.description: Delete a comment (soft delete, author only). Returns the deleted comment.

403.description: Not authorized to delete this comment

get.summary: Get a comment by post number
get.description: Get a single comment by its mint address and post number

post.description: Create a new comment on a token

202.description: Video accepted; the X post is running in the background. Poll /comments/submission/{nonce}.

get.description: Poll the outcome of a video comment that is being posted to X in the background.

delete.description: Admin-only: Hard delete a comment and its associated media. Returns the deleted comment.
Admin-only: Delete media from a comment without deleting the comment itself. Returns the updated comment.

post.description: Report inappropriate content. Rate limited to prevent abuse (20 requests per 5 minutes).

get.summary: Top yaps for the landing content section
get.description: Public, cached. Top comments across claimed tokens on a chain, by visible engagement or tips.
Public, cached. Latest claimed-token yaps that were cross-posted to X (have an xTweetId).
Public, cached. tab=hot returns recent tip events; tab=tippers/earners return recent leaderboards ranked by distinct counterparties.
Public, cached. One merged tip-economy feed in USD: tipped comments, top earners/gifters (7d), popular comments (7d).
Public, cached. Aggregates the landing feed, sidebar, content tabs, and ticker for first paint.
Returns the user's fuel gauge state for a specific token, including credit balance, cycle info, and available units.

get.summary: Get fuel gauge status for multiple tokens
get.description: Returns the user's fuel gauge state for several tokens in one request, keyed by token address, so feed pages avoid a per-card request fanout.

post.summary: Reset fuel cycle after failed wallet top-up
post.description: Marks the current token fuel cycle as restarted for the authenticated user.

get.summary: Prepare a gift permit for signing
get.description: Validates eligibility, computes amount, and returns EIP-712 typed data for the frontend to sign.

post.description: Accepts a frontend-signed EIP-712 gift permit, submits to the relayer, and confirms on-chain.
Toggle dislike on a comment. If liked, it switches to dislike.
Toggle like on a comment. If disliked, it switches to like.
Toggle a favorite on a token. Creates if not exists, deletes if exists.

get.description: Get paginated Fire tokens for the launchpad feed. Uses cursor-based pagination for scalability.

schema.description: Number of tokens per page (max 50)

parameters.description: Number of tokens per page (max 50)
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Comma-separated list of categories to filter by

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of categories to filter by
parameters.name: categories

schema.description: Minimum market cap in USD

parameters.description: Minimum market cap in USD
parameters.name: minMarketCap

schema.description: Maximum market cap in USD

parameters.description: Maximum market cap in USD
parameters.name: maxMarketCap

schema.description: Minimum 24h volume in USD

parameters.description: Minimum 24h volume in USD
parameters.name: minVolume

schema.description: Maximum 24h volume in USD

parameters.description: Maximum 24h volume in USD
parameters.name: maxVolume

schema.description: Hide graduated tokens when set to 'true'

parameters.description: Hide graduated tokens when set to 'true'
parameters.name: hideGraduated

schema.description: Custom sort: comma-separated field:direction pairs (max 3). Fields: newest, marketCap, buyers, trades, yapped, fueled, volume, graduationProgress

parameters.description: Custom sort: comma-separated field:direction pairs (max 3). Fields: newest, marketCap, buyers, trades, yapped, fueled, volume, graduationProgress
parameters.name: sortBy

schema.description: Offset for pagination (used with sortBy custom sort)

parameters.description: Offset for pagination (used with sortBy custom sort)
parameters.name: offset

schema.description: Filter by graduation status

parameters.description: Filter by graduation status
parameters.name: graduationFilter

schema.description: Max token age filter (e.g., '5m', '1h', '6h', '12h', '1d', '1w', '1m')

parameters.description: Max token age filter (e.g., '5m', '1h', '6h', '12h', '1d', '1w', '1m')
parameters.name: tokenAge

schema.description: Minimum buy velocity threshold (buysLast1h / buysPrev1h ratio)

parameters.description: Minimum buy velocity threshold (buysLast1h / buysPrev1h ratio)
parameters.name: minBuyVelocity

schema.description: Show only user's favorited tokens when set to 'true'

parameters.description: Show only user's favorited tokens when set to 'true'
parameters.name: favoritesOnly

schema.description: Show only tokens launched by the authenticated user when set to 'true'

parameters.description: Show only tokens launched by the authenticated user when set to 'true'
parameters.name: myLaunchesOnly

schema.description: Search tokens by name or symbol (case-insensitive)

parameters.description: Search tokens by name or symbol (case-insensitive)
parameters.name: query

schema.description: Include unclaimed tokens in results when set to 'true'

parameters.description: Include unclaimed tokens in results when set to 'true'
parameters.name: showUnclaimed

schema.description: Filter by creator wallet address

parameters.description: Filter by creator wallet address
parameters.name: creatorAddress

schema.description: Offset fallback for ranked feed pagination

parameters.name: categories

parameters.name: category

get.description: Get top tokens for sidebar display (trending, heating up, latest) in a single request with minimal data.

schema.description: Number of tokens per section (max 10)

parameters.description: Number of tokens per section (max 10)
parameters.name: limit

get.summary: Get tokens with tip credit deposits
get.description: Returns distinct tokens where the authenticated user has deposited fuel credits.

get.summary: Get tokens with tips received as creator
get.description: Returns distinct tokens where the authenticated user received fuel gifts as creator.
Returns paginated confirmed tip gifts sent by the authenticated user.

post.description: Records a unique authenticated share attribution for a comment and destination.
Create a draft token launch with initial form data

get.description: Get all pending (non-completed, non-failed) launches for the current user
Get a token launch by its ID

delete.description: Delete a draft or failed launch

400.description: Cannot delete launch in current state

post.description: Upload and process an image for the token launch
Submit the token address after on-chain deployment. Backend verifies creator on-chain and creates TokenMetadata.
Mark a launch as failed with an error message
Admin-only: Create a new badge that can be assigned to users.

delete.description: Admin-only: Delete a badge. Removes it from all assigned users first.

patch.description: Admin-only: Update a badge's name and/or image URL.

post.description: Admin-only: Upload an image for a badge. Returns the processed image URL.

schema.description: ISO timestamp cursor for pagination

parameters.description: ISO timestamp cursor for pagination
parameters.name: cursor

get.summary: Get VAPID public key for push subscription

post.summary: Register a push subscription for the current user
Store X OAuth 2.0 tokens from Privy
post.description: Store OAuth 2.0 tokens obtained via Privy login for X API access
